Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Jak Escalon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Jak is a descendant of Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Jak is the acting president of the Escalon Company.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 40''' — Jak is the nephew of the narrator and an arms dealer.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 22''' — Jak is the grandson of Omega and the President of the Escalon Company.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 22''' — Jak is publicly known as Omega's nephew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 22''' — Omega had a call with Jak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 41''' — Jak is mentioned as a potential combatant or family member of Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 43''' — Jak Escalon is accused of illegal weapon manufacturing and smuggling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 43''' — Jak is the grandson of a man with insane laughter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 43''' — Jak was not cooperative with Nafir Nuren.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Omega scooped up Jak.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — Jak is the president of a galactic corporation and Aila's son.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — Jak is almost fifty years old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 42''' — Jak is described as a thin, weaselly man with gray at his temples and a nervous look tattooed on his face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 42''' — Jak was previously captured by the Advocates.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
